summary_en: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
why_it_matters_zh: 此次 Dialogues 汇聚行业领袖，展示最前沿的科技发展动向，帮助理解技术如何塑造未来。
why_it_matters_en: The Dialogues brought together industry leaders to showcase cutting-edge technological advances, helping to understand how technology shapes the future.

summary_zh: 在2026年Google I/O大会上，我们发布了Gemini Omni、Google反重力技术、Universal Cart等众多创新产品，以下是精彩亮点。

title_zh: BOHM：复合AI系统的零成本分层归因方法
title_en: BOHM: Zero-Cost Hierarchical Attribution for Compound AI Systems
summary_zh: BOHM是一种针对复合AI系统的新型分层归因方法，该方法直接利用系统的路由权重提取归因树，实现了零边际成本且无需访问组件内部。相较于传统的基于Shapley方法的归因，BOHM能同时提供多层级归因，且在不需要大量子集评估的情况下，保持较高的排名一致性，适用于第三方API和不透明端点等场景。
summary_en: BOHM is a novel hierarchical attribution method for compound AI systems that extracts attribution trees directly from routing weights at zero marginal cost and without internal access to components. Compared to traditional Shapley-based attribution, BOHM provides multi-resolution attribution simultaneously and achieves high ranking concordance without costly coalition evaluations, making it suitable for third-party APIs and opaque endpoints.
why_it_matters_zh: BOHM解决了传统归因方法在面对不透明或受限访问组件时的评估难题，通过多层级且零成本的归因方式，为复杂AI系统的任务贡献分析提供了高效且实用的工具。
why_it_matters_en: BOHM addresses the evaluation challenges of traditional attribution methods when components are opaque or have limited access. Its multi-level, zero-cost attribution approach offers an efficient and practical tool for task contribution analysis in complex AI systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: BOHM: Zero-Cost Hierarchical Attribution for Compound AI Systems. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: NeuroNL2LTL：一种用于线性时序逻辑自然语言翻译的神经符号框架
title_en: NeuroNL2LTL: A Neurosymbolic Framework for Natural Language Translation of Linear Temporal Logic
summary_zh: NeuroNL2LTL提出了一种结合学习翻译与形式验证的神经符号架构，通过结构保持的中间表示进行自然语言与线性时序逻辑（LTL）间的高效转换。系统对生成的规范进行可满足性和非平凡性检查，采用最小编辑修复机制纠正接近正确的输出，并通过验证器反馈的强化学习训练神经组件，优化翻译的形式正确性。该方法在超过20万个跨航空航天、机器人和自动驾驶等领域的需求上实现了28%的语义等价率，且86%的输出被验证为可满足，同时能生成上下文相关的解释，帮助领域专家验证规范，无需专业训练。
summary_en: NeuroNL2LTL introduces a neurosymbolic architecture unifying learned translation with formal verification for effective translation between natural language and Linear Temporal Logic (LTL). The approach uses a structure-preserving intermediate representation and applies satisfiability and non-triviality checks with a minimal-edit repair to correct near-correct outputs. Verifier-in-the-loop training employs verification outcomes as reinforcement learning rewards, directly optimizing formal correctness. Tested on over 200,000 requirements across aerospace, robotics, autonomous vehicles, and more, it achieves 28% semantic equivalence with references and 86% verified satisfiability rates. Additionally, it produces context-aware explanations enabling domain experts to validate specifications without specialized knowledge.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作创新性地将形式验证纳入神经网络的训练和推理流程，通过验证反馈作为奖励信号提升模型准确性，解决了模板方法与纯神经方法在可靠性与表达能力上的权衡。同时生成可解释输出促进跨领域专家的规范验证，提升了形式化规范的实用性和影响力。
why_it_matters_en: This work innovatively integrates formal verification into the neural model’s training and inference by using verification feedback as reward signals, addressing the trade-offs between template-based and neural approaches in reliability and expressiveness. Its ability to generate interpretable outputs facilitates specification validation by domain experts, enhancing the practicality and impact of formal specifications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: NeuroNL2LTL: A Neurosymbolic Framework for Natural Language Translation of Linear Temporal Logic. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: RMA：面向研究级数学问题的智能代理系统
title_en: RMA: an Agentic System for Research-Level Mathematical Problems
summary_zh: 本文介绍了Research Math Agents (RMA)，一个针对研究级数学问题自动推理的智能代理框架。RMA区别于以往聚焦竞赛数学或形式定理证明的研究，专注于需要长远推理、文献依托和迭代证明优化的数学难题。该系统将问题分析、文献检索与理解、公平比较、知识库构建和证明验证等任务模块化，由初始化、提议和验证三个代理通过共享结构化内存协调合作。在First Proof基准测试中，RMA解决了十个研究级数学问题中的八个，表现优于包括GPT-5.2R和Aletheia在内的强大基线，生成的证明更具逻辑严谨性和可读性。消融研究表明，性能提升源自结构化推理模块交互、迭代优化及验证者反馈的协同作用。相关方案与实现将在论文被接受后公开。
summary_en: This paper presents Research Math Agents (RMA), an agentic framework for automated reasoning on research-level mathematical problems. Unlike prior work focused on competition math or formal theorem proving, RMA targets problems requiring long-horizon reasoning, literature grounding, and iterative proof refinement. It decomposes proof solving into modules for problem analysis, literature understanding, fair comparison, knowledge-bank building, and proof verification, coordinated by initializer, proposer, and verifier agents through shared structured memory. On the First Proof benchmark of ten expert-contributed problems, RMA solved eight, outperforming strong baselines including GPT-5.2R and Aletheia, producing more logically sound and readable proofs. Ablation studies reveal that gains arise from the interplay of structured reasoning, iterative refinement, and verifier feedback rather than any single module. The solutions and code will be publicly released upon acceptance.
why_it_matters_zh: 研究级数学问题通常涉及复杂且长时间的推理过程，需要结合丰富的文献资源与反复的证明迭代。RMA通过模块化设计并引入多个角色代理协作，有效整合结构化记忆和迭代反馈机制，提升了解题质量和可读性，推动了人工智能在高水平数学研究中的应用。
why_it_matters_en: Research-level mathematical problems require complex long-horizon reasoning combined with extensive literature grounding and iterative proof refinement. RMA’s modular design and multi-agent collaboration, leveraging structured memory and iterative verifier feedback, enhance solution quality and readability, advancing AI capabilities in high-level mathematical research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: RMA: an Agentic System for Research-Level Mathematical Problems. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 豪萨语和丰贝语的文本与语音资源调查：NLP开发的可用性、质量及空白
title_en: A Survey of Text and Speech Resources for Hausa and Fongbe: Availability, Quality, and Gaps for NLP Development
summary_zh: 本文综述了两种西非语言——豪萨语和丰贝语的公开文本与语音资源。豪萨语拥有约8000-1亿使用者，资源较丰富，包括新闻、百科和教育领域文本；丰贝语约有200万人口，文本资源有限，但近年来语音数据收集有所增加。两者均包含于Masakhane针对命名实体识别和词性标注的基准中。文章详细记录了各资源的规模、领域、格式、许可证和获取方式，并提出了任务导向的建议，指出丰贝文本多样性不足及豪萨语语音资源缺失为主要空白。
summary_en: This survey catalogs publicly available text and speech resources for Hausa and Fongbe, two West African languages with contrasting resource availability. Hausa, spoken by about 80-100 million people, has diverse text resources across news, encyclopedic, and educational domains. Fongbe, spoken by around 2 million, has fewer text resources but recent academic efforts have expanded speech datasets. Both languages feature in Masakhane benchmarks for NER and POS tagging. The study details resource characteristics and recommends prioritizing domain-diverse Fongbe text and dedicated Hausa speech corpora to fill existing gaps.
why_it_matters_zh: 了解豪萨语和丰贝语的NLP资源现状，有助于推动这些非洲语种的自然语言处理研究与应用发展，弥补资源不足带来的限制。
why_it_matters_en: Understanding the current NLP resource landscape for Hausa and Fongbe supports advancing natural language processing research and applications for these African languages, addressing limitations caused by resource scarcity.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A Survey of Text and Speech Resources for Hausa and Fongbe: Availability, Quality, and Gaps for NLP Development. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 面向查询的自适应语义分块：带上下文窗口扩展的动态检索增强生成策略
title_en: Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Dynamic Strategy with Contextual Window Expansion
summary_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统对文档分块质量高度依赖。传统固定分块忽略语义和用户意图，难以解决精确率与召回率的权衡。本文提出查询自适应语义分块（QASC），通过将查询融入分块过程，引入句子与查询嵌入的余弦相似度判定种子句，基于种子句的上下文窗口扩展保持连贯性，以及块级评分聚合确保整体相关性。实验在100篇技术文档和200个多类型查询上进行，QASC的F1值达0.85，相较固定分块提升18-27%，优于语义及代理分块8-12%。消融实验和人工评估（Cohen kappa=0.82）确认各组件贡献显著，且分块相关性与连贯性更优。
summary_en: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) critically relies on document chunking quality. Fixed chunking ignores semantics and user intent, limiting the precision-recall trade-off. This work introduces Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking (QASC) that incorporates queries into segmentation via cosine similarity between sentence and query embeddings to find seed sentences, contextual window expansion around seeds to maintain coherence, and chunk-level score aggregation for holistic relevance. Evaluated on 100 technical documents with 200 diverse queries, QASC achieves an F1-score of 0.85, improving by 18-27% over fixed chunking and 8-12% over semantic and agentic methods. Ablation studies and human evaluation (Cohen kappa=0.82) validate each component's significance and confirm superior relevance and coherence of chunks.
why_it_matters_zh: 将用户查询直接纳入文档分块过程，动态调整分块边界和内容，使分块更精准地反映查询意图，改善检索相关性与上下文连贯性，是提升RAG系统性能的关键。QASC方法创新地结合了语义相似度和上下文窗口扩展，满足了这一需求，实验结果和人工评价均显示显著优势。
why_it_matters_en: Directly integrating user queries into the document chunking process enables dynamic adjustment of chunk boundaries and content, making chunks better aligned with query intent and improving retrieval relevance and contextual coherence. QASC innovatively combines semantic similarity and contextual window expansion to fulfill this requirement, with experimental results and human evaluations demonstrating clear benefits.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Dynamic Strategy with Contextual Window Expansion. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 面向低资源开放源代码Text-to-SQL模型的知识蒸馏
title_en: Knowledge Distillation for Low-Resource Open-source Text-to-SQL Model
summary_zh: Text-to-SQL技术将自然语言问题转换为可执行的SQL查询，使非技术用户能够访问关系数据库进行分析和智能数据服务。在实际应用中，性能常受限于标注数据稀缺，尤其是领域特定数据库的高质量<问题, SQL>对。此外，数据库模式不透明、缩写使用及隐含业务逻辑带来额外挑战。现有的数据合成和提示技术提升覆盖但难以生成符合数据库约束的任务特定语义样本。为此，本文提出一种知识感知的Text-to-SQL框架，构建包括模式语义、缩写、业务逻辑及查询模式的任务知识库，并注入训练与推理过程。该框架生成多样且语境相关的合成训练数据，通过目标知识检索增强推理。七个基准测试显示，该方法显著提升了开源及闭源大语言模型在Text-to-SQL任务中的表现，尤其在低资源领域环境下提升泛化性、鲁棒性与适应性。
summary_en: Text-to-SQL converts natural language questions into executable SQL queries, enabling non-technical users to access relational databases for analytics and intelligent data services. Real-world performance is often limited by scarce high-quality annotated <question, SQL> pairs, especially for domain-specific databases. Challenges include opaque schema definitions, abbreviations, and implicit business logic not explicitly encoded in the schema. Existing data synthesis and prompting improve coverage but often fail to produce task-specific, semantically grounded examples aligned with database constraints. To address this, the paper proposes a knowledge-aware Text-to-SQL framework that builds a task-specific knowledge base including schema semantics, abbreviations, business logic, and query patterns, which is integrated into training and inference. This generates diverse, contextually grounded synthetic training data and enhances inference through targeted knowledge retrieval. Experiments on seven benchmarks demonstrate substantial performance gains for open-source and closed-source large language models in Text-to-SQL tasks, especially in low-resource domain-specific settings, improving generalization, robustness, and adaptability.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过构建任务专属知识库并结合训练与推理阶段，有效解决了标注数据稀缺和数据库复杂性的挑战，提升了模型在低资源领域场景的适用性和性能，推动了Text-to-SQL技术更广泛的应用。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the challenges of scarce annotated data and complex database structures by building a task-specific knowledge base integrated into training and inference, effectively improving model performance and applicability in low-resource domain scenarios, thereby advancing broader adoption of Text-to-SQL technology.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Knowledge Distillation for Low-Resource Open-source Text-to-SQL Model. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Harness、Scaffold 以及 AI 代理术语的重要性
title_en: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right
summary_zh: 本文探讨了“Harness”、“Scaffold”与“AI代理”这些术语在人工智能领域的重要意义，强调准确理解和使用它们对于推动AI技术发展和应用的必要性。
summary_en: This article discusses the significance of the terms “Harness,” “Scaffold,” and “AI Agent” in the AI field, emphasizing that correctly understanding and using these terms is essential for advancing AI technology and applications.
why_it_matters_zh: 准确的术语有助于技术交流和协作，避免误解，推动AI技术更好地发展。
why_it_matters_en: Precise terminology facilitates clearer communication and collaboration, prevents misunderstandings, and advances the development of AI technology.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 迈向光速文本生成：Nemotron-Labs扩散语言模型
title_en: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
summary_zh: Nemotron-Labs提出了一种基于扩散模型的语言生成技术，致力于实现接近光速的文本生成速度，提升自然语言处理的效率。
summary_en: Nemotron-Labs introduces a diffusion-based language model aimed at achieving near speed-of-light text generation, enhancing the efficiency of natural language processing.
why_it_matters_zh: 该技术有望显著提升文本生成的速度和性能，对实时应用和大规模文本处理具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: This technology could substantially improve text generation speed and performance, which is crucial for real-time applications and large-scale text processing.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 专注胜于规模：大多数AI采购决策忽视的战略变量
title_en: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
summary_zh: Hugging Face博客文章指出，在AI采购决策中，专注性比规模更为关键。许多公司在选择AI服务时，往往忽略了专业化的重要性，而专注的解决方案能带来更高效、更符合需求的结果。
summary_en: A Hugging Face blog highlights that in AI procurement, specialization is more crucial than scale. Many companies tend to overlook this strategic variable when selecting AI services, but specialized solutions can yield more efficient and targeted outcomes.
why_it_matters_zh: 因为AI的应用场景多样化，专注于特定领域的AI工具能够更精准地满足用户需求，提升效果和效率；而盲目追求规模容易导致资源浪费与性能不足。
why_it_matters_en: Because AI applications are diverse, specialized AI tools can better meet user needs with greater precision and efficiency; blindly pursuing scale may result in wasted resources and suboptimal performance.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

why_it_matters_en: By implementing ChatGPT, AdventHealth improves healthcare efficiency which helps enhance patient experience and quality of care.

title_zh: OpenAI模型驳斥离散几何中的核心猜想

summary_en: An OpenAI model has solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一发现展示了人工智能在解决复杂数学难题上的潜力，推动了数学研究方法的革新。
why_it_matters_en: This discovery demonstrates AI's potential in tackling complex mathematical problems, advancing the methodology of mathematical research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI 推进“教育国家”计划新阶段

summary_zh: OpenAI 推动“教育国家”计划，扩大 AI 在学校的应用，建立新合作关系，开展教师培训，并提供工具以提升全球学习效果。
